name: seo-butler
description: Your autonomous SEO/GEO butler. After you ship a site, run one command and it discovers your whole project, plans every SEO and Generative Engine Optimization task like an expert, then applies them safely — sitemaps, meta, structured data, alt text, llms.txt, Search Console and Analytics. It backs up before editing and verifies after (never breaks your site), stays current via live framework docs (context7), and remembers what it did so it never re-surprises you.
